/* Date of Brexit */ the point is the time for exit is stated expressly in the UK legislation for particular reasons of UK  legislative drafting and interpretation, not BST, UTC etc., but it is the same as the time stated by EU's "Directives for the negotiation of an agreement".

/* Date of Brexit */ the question is not "how late is that in NY?". The point is that the *same* moment of Brexit is *different* in the two locations. UK changes at local 23:00h, not midnight. (unlike New Years eve: then BRU and LON change one hour after each other)
